extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan claimed yellow when organizers neutralized the stage atop Col de l'Iseran due to hailstorms, freezing times before ALAPHILIPPE could recover his 2:07 deficit on descent
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint attacked personally after teammates finished pacing, revealing Ineos willing to sacrifice dual-leader strategy when opportunity appears.
PINOT Thibaut withdrew with injury just as peloton fractured on Monté de Solo, showing fragility under simultaneous physical/tactical pressure.
Neutralization at Iseran summit rather than valley punished descending skills, rewarding climbers who cracked ALAPHILIPPE uphill before recovery opportunity.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: personally attacked after teammates depleted, showing form and willingness to challenge own team hierarchy
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: retired from tour with sudden injury during critical climb split, completely eliminating GC threat
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: gained 2:07 on ALAPHILIPPE on Iseran ascent before neutralization, demonstrating superior high-altitude climbing
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: lost yellow jersey when organizers froze times at mountain summit, erasing his descending advantage before using it
